TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Mizuhu = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Mizuhu. 99 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 286 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 95% niqan 271 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 5% niqan 15 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 90%, Tayal 1%, Amis 1%, Hla'alua 1%, Paiwan 1%.
S.PHON: = mi*uħu = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ mi*uħu. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, tajal *%, amis *%, ħla'alua *%, paiwan *%.
S.FORM: = Mizuhu = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Mizuhu. 99 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 286 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 95% niqan 271 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 5% niqan 15 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 90%, Tayal 1%, Amis 1%, Hla'alua 1%, Paiwan 1%.
S.PHON: = mi*uħu = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ mi*uħu. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, tajal *%, amis *%, ħla'alua *%, paiwan *%.
